name: 7p11_2_EGFR_region
description: 7p11.2 region around EGFR (Epidermal Growth Factor Receptor). Hosts intra-EGFR partial duplications (EGFRvIII / vII variants in glioblastoma) and is a recurrent focal amplification target in cancer (extrachromosomal DNA/ecDNA amplicons). Reference is single-copy but tumor samples carry massive copy-number gains.

architecture.internal_structure: EGFR (188 kb) flanked by small SDs; in cancer, ecDNA amplicons of 0.5-2 Mb encompass EGFR with copy numbers up to >100; intragenic exon 2-7 deletion creates EGFRvIII oncoprotein.
